title: senna glutinosa nothosubsp. luerssenii
intro: Senna glutinosa nothosubsp. luerssenii, also known as Luerssen's senna, is a plant species in the Fabaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its laxative effects due to the presence of anthraquinone glycosides. The health benefits of Senna glutinosa nothosubsp. luerssenii include relief from constipation, improved digestion, and reduced inflammation. The plant is commonly prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, often in traditional herbal remedies and teas.
